Unsend all your sent messages in any Facebook Messenger conversation with one click. Scrolls entire chat history.

Unsender for Facebook lets you bulk-unsend every message you've ever sent in any Facebook Messenger conversation automatically.

  HOW IT WORKS
  1. Open a Messenger conversation on facebook.com or messenger.com
  2. Click the extension icon
  3. Set your preferred delay (default 3–7 seconds)
  4. Click "Start Unsending"
  The extension scrolls through your entire chat history, finds your messages, and unsends them one by one.

  FEATURES
  • One-click unsend — Start the process and walk away
  • Smart scrolling — Automatically loads your full chat history
  • Only your messages — Never touches the other person's messages
  • Configurable delays — Set min/max delay to avoid rate limits
  • Live progress overlay — Real-time counter shown on the page
  • Works on both facebook.com/messages and messenger.com
  • Multi-language — Works in English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Dutch, Russian, and Arabic

  PRIVACY & SECURITY
  • No data collection — nothing is stored or sent anywhere
  • Runs 100% locally in your browser
  • Minimal permissions — only what's needed to function
  • Open source

  FAQ
  Q: Will this delete the other person's messages?
  A: No. Only your sent messages are unsent.

  Q: Can the other person see that I unsent messages?
  A: Facebook does not send notifications for unsent messages, but the message disappears from both sides.

  Q: Does it work with group chats?
  A: Yes — it only unsends your own messages within the group.

  Q: How fast is it?
  A: With default settings (3–7s delay), roughly 8–15 messages per minute.

  DISCLAIMER
  This extension interacts with Facebook's web interface. Using automation tools may violate Facebook's Terms of Service. Use at your own risk. Use reasonable delay settings (3+ seconds) to minimize risk.
Chrome extension to help convert any web page to tailwind css classes

Chrome Extension: HTML to Tailwind

Easily transform any web page’s HTML and it's style into a ready-to-use tailwind css. This extension lets you select elements directly from a webpage and quickly convert them into tailwind classes. It supports capturing part of the web page and also support capturing the entire web page. The output format can be selected from this options:

-HTML format
-React jsx format 
-React component
一个用于微搭开发的Chrome扩展

微搭低代码浏览器调试工具，可以调试微搭低代码的实时预览地址，查看应用的运行状态、数据请求、调试代码和查看完整配置

GITHUB
https://github.com/TencentCloudBase/weda-devtools

使用文档

https://docs.cloudbase.net/lowcode/debug/devtools

WeDa DevTools 可以帮助开发者快速定位和解决问题，提高开发效率。以下是 WeDa DevTools 的主要功能：

- 组件调试：WeDa DevTools 可以帮助开发者调试组件，包括查看组件的 props、状态、样式等信息，以及修改组件的 props、状态、样式等属性，方便开发者进行调试和测试。

- API 调试：WeDa DevTools 可以帮助开发者调试 API，包括查看 API 的请求和响应信息，以及修改 API 的请求参数和响应数据，方便开发者进行接口测试和调试。

- 数据调试：WeDa DevTools 可以帮助开发者调试数据，包括查看数据的结构和内容，以及修改数据的值和格式，方便开发者进行数据测试和调试。

WeDa DevTools is a low-code developer debug tool that provides rich debugging features to help developers debug components, APIs, data, and more.

WeDa DevTools can help developers quickly locate and solve problems, improving development efficiency. The main features of WeDa DevTools include:

- Component debugging: WeDa DevTools can help developers debug components, including viewing component props, state, styles, and other information, as well as modifying component props, state, styles, and other properties, making it easy for developers to debug and test.

- API debugging: WeDa  DevTools can help developers debug APIs, including viewing API request and response information, as well as modifying API request parameters and response data, making it easy for developers to test and debug interfaces.

- Data debugging: WeDa DevTools can help developers debug data, including viewing the structure and content of data, as well as modifying the values and formats of data, making it easy for developers to test and debug data.
See your website's performance. Live. Real-time LCP, INP, and CLS metrics with visual overlays.

Other tools give you numbers. Core Web Vitals Live shows you the problem.

A game-style HUD displays LCP, INP, and CLS as color-coded life bars right on the page — green, amber, or red at a glance. But the real power is in the visual overlays: see the exact element causing your Largest Contentful Paint, watch layout shifts highlighted in real time as they happen, and spot slow interactions with duration badges that appear right where you clicked. No more guessing which element is the culprit — it's highlighted on screen.

Built on Google's official web-vitals library with the same thresholds used by PageSpeed Insights and Search Console. Zero data collection, zero external requests — everything runs locally in your browser.

FEATURES

Live HUD overlay
LCP, INP, and CLS displayed as color-coded life bars in a corner of your page. Green → amber → red tells you instantly if something's wrong. Minimizable and repositionable.

See your LCP element
A pulsing blue border and label highlight the exact element responsible for your Largest Contentful Paint. No more digging through DevTools — it's right there on the page.

Watch layout shifts happen
Every CLS event is visualized as a purple overlay on the shifted element with its score (e.g. "CLS +0.03"). You'll finally understand where your layout instability comes from.

Spot slow interactions instantly
After every click or tap, an INP badge appears near your cursor: amber for 50–200 ms, red for >200 ms. You'll know immediately which interaction is dragging your score down.

Toolbar badge
The extension icon turns green, amber, or red and shows your worst metric value — performance status visible without even opening anything.

Device throttling
Simulate slow CPU and network conditions to test how your site performs for users on low-end devices.

Privacy-first
No data leaves your browser. No accounts, no tracking, no external API calls. Your browsing stays yours.

Aligned with Google's tools
Uses the official web-vitals library — the same measurement logic and thresholds as PageSpeed Insights, Search Console, and CrUX.

Capture and inspect WebAuthn API calls in DevTools

Open WebAuthn Pane in DevTools and you'll be able to audit input and output of the WebAuthn API requests. It also parses encoded or hashed payload so you can investigate its contents in detail.

This extension does not collect or send information to the server.
Owloops extension for exporting Owloops tests from DevTools recorder and AI browser automation.

This extension allows you to export recordings from Chrome DevTools Recorder as Owloops tests quickly.

It comes with the Replay feature, which allows users to easily sync the recordings to the Owloops platform and replay them.

Owloops AI simplifies browser automation and exploratory testing by interpreting user instructions and executing actions such as clicks and text input, leveraging advanced models like GPT-4 for understanding and processing tasks.

INIAD MOOCs の講義スライドを PDF として保存しやすくする拡張機能

INIADPLUS は、INIAD MOOCs の講義スライドを PDF として保存しやすくするための非公式な Chrome 拡張です。講義ページに PDF 保存ボタンを追加し、Google スライドで配信されている資料を Chrome の印刷機能経由で PDF として保存できます。加えて、メモ、時間割 JSON の取り込み、表示補助などの補助機能も利用できます。処理はユーザーのブラウザ内で完結し、作者のサーバーへデータを送信しません。

Supamill helps you build workflows and allows you to run agents in the browser.

Supamill lets you build powerful workflows in seconds using a simple chat interface. It connects with popular tools like Gmail, Outlook, HubSpot, Google Sheets, Drive, and more. On top of this if your workflow involves a step that needs to use your Browser we support it with this chrome extension. This Chrome extension extends the power of Supamill by enabling our agent to interact directly with websites that are required to finsh workflow.

Many real-world workflows involve steps that can only be completed inside a browser. For example, extracting information from web apps, submitting forms or clicking through internal tools. With this extension, Supamill can automate those steps just like a human would—reading, clicking, typing, and navigating pages on your behalf.

Whether you're drafting daily summary emails based on dashboard data, logging into portals to gather reports, or triggering actions in web-based tools, this extension makes it possible. It's a key component for anyone building workflows that involve live, browser-based interaction.

Install the Supamill Chrome Extension to unlock full automation potential right inside your browser.


All rights reserved. This extension is proprietary to Supmaill (Dotflo Inc.)

Boost your automation capabilities effortlessly. 
 Streamline tasks with alfaRPA Studio's expanded features.

alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation is a cutting-edge Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool designed to streamline and automate your daily tasks directly from your Chrome browser. alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation offers a user-friendly interface and powerful automation capabilities, enabling users to build, deploy, and manage automation workflows with ease.

alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation is an advanced Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool tailored for capturing web elements and obtaining their details, including XPath, directly from your Chrome browser. Designed for efficiency and ease of use, alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation simplifies the process of web automation, making it an essential tool for developers and automation enthusiasts.

Key features:

Effortless Element Capture:  alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation lets you visually select elements on web pages. No coding required!

Rich Element Details: Get comprehensive information about captured elements, including XPath, ID, class names, and other attributes. This makes scripting your automations a breeze.

Automate More Than Clicks: alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation goes beyond simple clicks and keystrokes. Automate complex interactions like form filling, data extraction, and more, similar to openRPA.

User-Friendly Interface: alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation intuitive design makes it easy to use, even for users without programming experience.

Boost Your Productivity:

Eliminate repetitive tasks and free yourself from manual clicking and form filling.
Focus on what matters most - alfaRPA Studio Browser Automation, can streamline your workflow and significantly improve your efficiency.
ZeroCrop: Smart DOM Element Screenshot Capture
Hover over any page element, click, captured. Zero cropping, pixel-perfect precision.

🚀 Stop cropping your screenshots. Hover, click, captured.

ZeroCrop detects HTML elements on any web page in real time. Hover over a button, a div, a table or an image, click, and the element is captured with pixel-perfect precision, no extra margins, no missing content.

✨ FEATURES:

⚡ Smart detection
ZeroCrop highlights the element under your cursor and displays its type (div, button, img…). Click to capture.

🧠 Dual capture engine
  • Standard mode: Fast rendering from the page DOM.
  • High Fidelity mode: Capture via Chrome DevTools protocol, pixel-perfect. Handles complex CSS, shadows, gradients, 3D transforms and sticky elements.

📐 Adjustable padding
Add 0 to 50 px of space around the captured element. A dashed preview shows the extended area before capture.

🎨 Format and export
PNG, JPEG or WebP, with adjustable quality. Save to disk, copy to clipboard, or both.

⚙️ Synced settings
Your preferences follow your Chrome account.

🔒 PRIVACY:

The extension only activates when you click its icon.

Why the "Debugger" permission?
High Fidelity mode uses the Chrome DevTools protocol to capture elements that standard tools can't handle. This mode is optional and no data is ever sent to a server.

Captures network requests in a .har file and console output to a text file

An extension to capture network traffic and console logs together in a ZIP. It will contain a .har file and a .json file

When getting support requests, it can be difficult for engineers to see the network state, and get detailed information from the console logs. With this extension you can get all information needed quickly.

1. Click to start debug capture.
2. Click again to save logs in a zip file

Displays EAN on Swisscom product pages

This Chrome extension will insert an EAN-13 barcode on a Swisscom product page. The same barcode can be found on the labels attached to physical product packages in Swisscom shops.

Note: It is in the category of developer tools. If the above doesn't make sense to you, that means you don't need it.
